refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using mission data inputs
Structured performance requirements database with versioning
Update management system for baselines and calibration history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated performance requirements management system combining derivation algorithms, traceable recording, and update management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation and recording due to traceability requirements
Update management depends on recorded data consistency
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability and history management effectively.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not tightly integrated
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design within the integrated DP to isolate derivation, recording, and update management functions to reduce complexity.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level module responsible for performance requirements derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data for performance requirement derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system modules or operators

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update management across distributed components

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module owns the full performance requirements lifecycle; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has limited relevance; forcing containment here would increase diffusion and complexity.
Teleoperation is not directly involved in performance requirements management.
Safety Services may consume performance data but should not own derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirements derivation, recording, and management in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and update history requirements.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if internal separation of concerns is not maintained
Dependency on accurate and timely telemetry data input
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear internal interfaces within NGHE Solution module to separate derivation, recording, and update management functions.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well decomposed and the selected DP logically addresses all sub-FRs with clear traceability and update management.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk by centralizing DP in NGHE Solution module
Internal complexity risk manageable by modular internal design
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution module, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by reviewing documented performance targets and update history within NGHE Solution module outputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add internal modularization within NGHE Solution to separate derivation, recording, and update management
Ensure telemetry data quality and availability for derivation accuracy

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the requirements, constraints, and architectural guidelines with acceptable risk and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Refine internal modularization within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity and improve maintainability.

assumptions: Mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can internally modularize functions effectively
open_risks: Data inconsistency if update management is not tightly integrated
Telemetry data availability impacting derivation accuracy
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceable performance requirements documentation
History logs of baseline and calibration updates
